assertions.title: maestro feature add with basic flags

steps.observed: Directory structure created successfully with mission.yaml

steps.action: Create mission with `maestro mission create --name 'Feature Test Mission' --objective 'Test feature management'`
Add feature with `maestro feature add --description 'Implement user auth' --skill worker`
steps.expected: Feature added to features.json with generated ID
steps.observed: Feature added successfully. Output: [ok] Added feature: 2026-03-29-tdxmcb-F1

steps.expected: features.json contains feature with id, description, skillName, status fields
steps.observed: features.json contains valid feature object with all required fields

evidence.commandOutput:
[ok] Added feature: 2026-03-29-tdxmcb-F1
  Description: Implement user authentication
  Skill: worker
  Status: pending

assertions.title: Feature with --preconditions stores array of precondition strings

steps.expected: Feature created with preconditions array in features.json
Feature object contains preconditions: ['Database schema ready', 'API endpoints defined']
steps.observed: features.json contains preconditions as string array

steps.expected: Feature created with expectedBehavior array in features.json
Feature object contains expectedBehavior: ['User can login', 'Session persists']
steps.observed: features.json contains expectedBehavior as string array

evidence.commandOutput: Feature added with expected behavior: 2 items

assertions.title: Feature with --fulfills links to assertion IDs

steps.expected: Feature created with fulfills array containing assertion IDs

steps.observed: features.json contains fulfills as array of assertion ID strings

evidence.commandOutput: Feature added with fulfills: VAL-001, VAL-002

assertions.title: maestro feature list shows all features with status in table format

steps.expected: Table output with ID, Status, Skill, Description columns
steps.observed: Table displayed with 4 features, showing ID, Status, Skill, Description columns

steps.expected: Columns aligned, descriptions truncated if too long
steps.observed: Table properly formatted with aligned columns and truncated descriptions over 50 chars

steps.expected: Status summary shows count per status (pending, assigned, etc.)

evidence.terminalOutput:
ID                    Status   Skill   Description
-----------------------------------------------------------
2026-03-29-tdxmcb-F1  pending  worker  Implement user aut...
...

assertions.title: Feature list --json returns features as JSON array

steps.expected: JSON array of feature objects with all fields
steps.observed: Valid JSON output with missionId, features array, byStatus counts, totalCount
JSON structure matches expected schema with all feature objects including id, description, status, skillName, preconditions, expectedBehavior, fulfills
JSON successfully parsed, 4 features in array

frictions.description: The --preconditions, --expected-behavior, and --fulfills flags require space-separated values which can be tricky with multi-word items. Single words work fine, but multi-word preconditions need careful quoting.
frictions.resolution: Used quoted strings with spaces for multi-word preconditions: --preconditions 'Database ready' 'API defined'

summary: Tested 6 assertions: All 6 passed (VAL-M2-FEATURE-001 through VAL-M2-FEATURE-006). The feature add and list commands work correctly with all optional flags. Table formatting is clean, JSON output is valid and parseable.
